title: Megumi no Daigo: Kyuukoku no Orange
titleRomaji: Megumi no Daigo: Kyuukoku no Orange
titleNative: め組の大吾 救国のオレンジ
synopsis: Shun Axeda struggled to overcome his own demons. Yuki Nakamura wanted to become one of the few female members of a special rescue team. And Daigo Juju met them with his outstanding talent and unshakable determination. These three firefighters aspired to join the Special Rescue Team (a.k.a. "Orange"), as the story of a "national crisis" in Japan began to unfold! (Source: Shounen Magazine, translated)

tags.name: Firefighters
tags.description: Centered around the life and activities of rescuers specialised in firefighting.

tags.name: Shounen
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult males.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

chapterSourceTitle: Megumi no Daigo - Kyuukoku no Orange

title: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan
titleRomaji: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan
titleNative: 人脈チートで始める人任せ英雄譚
synonyms: A Heroic Legend Where Everyone Else Does the Work and Starts With a Social Relations Cheat
synopsis: Net is a young man whose true skill lies in his large personal connections, which has allowed him to achieve great feats from behind the scenes. One day, however, his own king runs out of patience with him, and banishes him from the legendary heroes' party. Now he has to start again as an adventurer, though he plans to make full use of his connections with powerful knightly orders and other races.
chapterSourceTitle: Jinmyaku Cheat de Hajimeru Hitomakase Eiyuu-tan

title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.

tags.description: Partly or completely set in a school club scene.

title: Zankyou
titleNative: 残響
synopsis: Satoru spends his days listlessly in a factory town. The old man Segawa, a former Yakuza, lives in the room next to his cheap apartment. One day, Segawa tells Satoru, "I'll give you 5 million yen to put me out of my misery". Satoru hesitates, and Segawa sees through to the madness eating away inside him and begins to have a change of heart, and yet...!? A story of the filth of society and the dark path that Satoru takes, on the edge of sanity, with a gun and 5 million yen.

title: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleRomaji: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?
titleNative: 終末なにしてますか? 忙しいですか? 救ってもらっていいですか?
synopsis: Five hundred years have passed since humanity went extinct at the hands of the fearsome "Beasts." Even up in the sky, where the surviving races dwell on floating islands, these monstrosities constantly threaten to bring death and destruction. Only a small group of young girls, the Leprechauns, can wield the ancient weapons needed to defeat these creatures. Into the girls' unstable and fleeting lives, where a call to certain death could come at any moment, enters an unlikely character: a young man who lost everything five hundred years ago, the last living human awakened from a long, icy slumber...

tags.name: Seinen
tags.description: Target demographic is adult males.

chapterSourceTitle: Shuumatsu Nani Shitemasu ka? Isogashii desu ka? Sukutte Moratte Ii desu ka?

titleNative: 史上最強の弟子ケンイチ
synopsis: The story is focused on Kenichi Shirahama, an average 15-year-old weakling, whose life turns to Hell with the appearance of the naive, beautiful, and strong transfer student, Miu Fūrinji. After Kenichi witnesses Miu's skills in martial arts, he joins the Ryōza

title: Rice Shoulder
titleNative: ライスショルダー
synopsis: The story revolves around a 202-pound, 18-year old girl named Okome Akino (whose name is a pun of "autumn rice"). After Okome enters a sumo match and wins against a male amateur fighter by a landslide, a trainer named Akane scouts her, and she enters the world of women's boxing. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: King in Limbo
titleNative: リンボ・ザ・キング
synonyms: リンボ ザ キング
synopsis: It's been eight years since the pandemic in which a deadly sleeping sickness claimed millions of lives. After a serious injury cost him a leg (and, nearly, his life), Petty Officer Adam Garfield retires from active service in the U.S. Navy. But his plan to focus on his family and physical therapy is shattered when he receives secret word that the sleeping sickness has returned, and it's his job to bring back the mysterious man who helped cure it by diving into people's memories—a man known by the codename "King." (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleRomaji: Aishite Hoshii no wa Ore ja Nai noni!: BL Game no Akuyaku Reisoku ni Tensei Shita noni Kirawarenakute Komattemasu
titleNative: 愛してほしいのは俺じゃないのに！ 〜BLゲームの悪役令息に転生したのに嫌われなくて困ってます〜
synopsis: One day, Arthur realizes that he’s been reincarnated as the villain in a BL game. On top of that, he remembers that based on the plot of the game, he only has endings like the “Imprisonment Ending” and “Tentacle Ending” waiting for him! With no other option to save his chastity and life, his only way out is getting his fiancée to get with the protagonist! Dragging along his trusty servant Edgar, he tries to craft up schemes to get the two of them together. But, rather than being hated as the villain, he starts raising BL flags of his own?! (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Mobile Suit Gundam SEED ECLIPSE
titleNative: 機動戦士ガンダムSEED ECLIPSE
synopsis: C.E. 72 was a unique era which would later be called the "two blank years." Some also called it "the time of peace on thin ice," and others call it "the break before the oncoming frenzy." This is the story of an interval. A story that takes place between two large wars in which members of a hollow unit known as ODR risked their lives.

title: The King's Avatar
titleNative: 全职高手
synopsis: No one could ever come close to “Battle God” Ye Qiu’s skills in Glory, a popular game that took the world by storm. His professional team, however, replaced him with another captain, and even seized his account. He was left to start anew at an internet cafe as a manager. When a new District 10 opened up in Glory, he dives back, armed with a decade of experience and an unfinished custom weapon. His path to redemption, filled with strategy and memories, marks his thrilling return to the summit. (Source: Tapas)

titleNative: 峠鬼

(Source: Yen Press)
